topbar.subtitle: Here's what Nexora AI has prepared for you today.

dashboard.aiActionDesc: You have 12 customers waiting for replies. I have drafted responses. Send now?
dashboard.aiActionDescShop: You have 4 orders pending shipment. Let me draft shipping labels and send automated tracking WhatsApp messages to customers?
dashboard.aiActionDescCafe: You have 3 digital orders pending approval in the kitchen. Let me review and dispatch them to the chef?

t1.name: Sarah Johnson
t1.lastMsg: I want to book a bridal facial for Saturday...
t1.draft: Hi Sarah! We'd love to have you. We have a bridal facial slot available this Saturday at 2 PM. Would you like me to book that for you?

t2.name: Mike Ross
t2.lastMsg: How much for the deep tissue massage?
t2.draft: Hi Mike! Our deep tissue massage is $150 for 90 minutes. Would you like to check our schedule for this afternoon?

t3.name: Emma Watson
t3.lastMsg: Thanks for the great service today!
t3.draft: Hi Emma! Thank you so much for your kind words! We look forward to seeing you again soon.

campaigns.title: AI Campaign Generator
campaigns.subtitle: Create data-driven campaigns powered by AI.
campaigns.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Fill Tuesday slots, promote new service
campaigns.keyPointsPlaceholder: e.g. 20% off facial, valid this week only, limited slots

appointments.aiSuggestionDesc: There is a 2.5 hour gap this afternoon. Send a 15% off last-minute offer to regulars?

insights.title: AI Executive Summary
insights.subtitle: Your business narrative for the past 30 days.
insights.growthDesc: Your AI-driven SMS campaigns resulted in a 24% increase in repeat bookings this month.
insights.improvementDesc: Tuesday morning appointments are showing a 15% drop in utilization.
insights.recommendationDesc: Add 'Couples Massage' to your service list. Detected 14 inquiries this week.
insights.weeklyRevenueSub: Daily income for the current week

settings.title: AI Settings & Knowledge
settings.subtitle: Train your copilot and configure automation rules.

business.title: Business Configuration
business.desc: Manage your business details and assistant tailoring.
business.tipDesc: Changing your business type dynamically customizes your sidebar menu, dashboard widgets, and AI features to fit your industry perfectly.

settings.uploadDesc: Upload your service menus, pricing, and FAQ documents so Nexora can answer customer questions accurately.
settings.uploadBox: Click to upload or drag and drop

sandbox.title: YZ Eğitim Simülatörü
sandbox.subtitle: Test how your AI answers questions based on your documents.
sandbox.defaultWelcome: Hello! I am trained on your loaded files. Ask me any question to test my answers!

replies.services: Based on your uploaded 'Services & Pricing.pdf', you offer: 1. Signature Facial ($120), 2. Deep Tissue Massage ($150), and 3. Manicure & Pedicure ($80). Bookings can be made directly.
replies.policy: According to your 'Cancellation Policy.txt', appointments cancelled less than 24 hours in advance incur a 50% late fee. No-shows are charged 100% of the service price.
replies.fallback: I've checked your knowledge sources ('Services & Pricing.pdf' and 'Cancellation Policy.txt') but couldn't find a direct answer. However, I will answer the customer professionally: 'We would love to help you with that! Please contact our reception directly.' Would you like to add this details to your files?

settings.comingSoonDesc: This section is being polished and will be available in the next update.

rules.title: Automation Rules
rules.desc: Configure how Nexora handles tasks automatically on your behalf.
rules.rule1Desc: Send a predefined message to Instagram/Facebook DMs received outside business hours.
rules.rule2Desc: Send a WhatsApp reminder 24 hours before any scheduled appointment.
rules.rule3Desc: Automatically ask for a Google Review 1 hour after a completed service.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's personalize your AI copilot. What type of business do you run?
onboarding.goalDesc: Nexora will optimize its dashboard based on your priority.

goals.bookingsDesc: Focus on lead generation and retargeting.
goals.timeDesc: Focus on automated replies and AI scheduling.
goals.retentionDesc: Focus on customer feedback and loyalty.

aiPanel.newOppDesc: You have a 2-hour gap on Tuesday. Should I draft a flash-sale SMS for past clients?
aiPanel.campResultDesc: Your weekend Instagram post is performing 24% better than average.

c1.name: Sarah Johnson
c1.aiNote: Usually books on Fridays. Prefers the deluxe package.
c1.analysis: Highly responsive to loyalty campaigns. Prefers premium facial products and is highly likely to purchase skin rejuvenation serums if offered.
c1.strategy: Elegant, professional, focus on premium benefits and long-term results.

c2.name: Michael Chen
c2.aiNote: Sensitive to strong scents. Always asks for the same therapist.
c2.analysis: Visits exactly once every two weeks. Highly sensitive to strong aromatic oils. Quiet, calm environments with minimal conversation are appreciated.
c2.strategy: Direct, concise, polite, respecting their preference for calm silence.

c3.name: Emma Thompson
c3.aiNote: Recently mentioned a bridal event coming up. Great upsell opportunity.
c3.analysis: Preparing for a bridal event. Excellent candidate for group event package booking discounts (e.g. bridesmaids bundles).
c3.strategy: Cheerful, celebratory, highlight ease of group organization.

c4.name: Jessica Alba
c4.aiNote: Has not visited in 3 weeks. Consider sending a re-engagement offer.
c4.analysis: Has not visited in 3 weeks. Engagement dropped after a 3-star rating on laser session. Highly recommend offering a recovery coupon with a custom check-in message.

c5.name: David Park
c5.aiNote: High-value customer. Birthday is next month — great opportunity for a special offer.
c5.analysis: High average ticket value. Birthday is next month. Highly recommends presenting an exclusive complimentary birthday head massage with his next facial.

services.title: Service Catalog
services.subtitle: Manage your services and pricing. Nexora AI learns from these automatically.

campaignResults.title: Campaign Results
campaignResults.subtitle: Track the performance of your sent and scheduled campaigns.

c1.title: Summer Skincare Bundle Promo
c1.aiNote: This post generated 48 new bookings — 24% above your average.

c2.title: Last-Minute Tuesday Flash Sale
c2.aiNote: SMS campaigns convert 3x better for last-minute slots. Consider repeating weekly.

c3.title: Mother's Day Special Offer
c3.aiNote: Scheduled to go live tomorrow morning at 8:00 AM.

ecommerce.title: Online Store
ecommerce.subtitle: Manage your orders, products, and store performance.
ecommerce.aiSuggestionDesc: 'Face Serum Bundle' is almost out of stock (3 left). Reorder now to avoid lost sales.

salon.note: Your salon is performing well. Responding to the 12 pending messages could push your score above 90.

clinic.note: No-show rate is slightly high. Consider sending automated reminders 24h before appointments.

gym.note: Class fill rate is below target. A flash-promo campaign could fill the remaining slots.

cafe.note: Excellent day! Your table turnover and average order value are both at peak performance.

shop.note: Pending shipments are dragging your score. Processing them now could increase your score by 12 points.

aiChat.title: Nexora AI
aiChat.greeting: Hi! I'm Nexora AI, your intelligent business copilot. I can help you with campaigns, customer insights, appointments, revenue analysis, and more. What would you like to know?
aiChat.cmdDefault: I'm analyzing your business data. Here's what I found:
aiChat.cmdCampaigns: Your campaigns are doing great! Your last campaign reached 4,200 people with a 57% conversion rate — well above industry average. Want me to create a new one?
aiChat.cmdRevenue: This week's revenue is $12,200 — up 14% vs last week. Your best day was Saturday ($2,800). Would you like me to identify which services are driving the most growth?
aiChat.cmdCustomers: You have 5 customers with 'At Risk' status, and 2 VIPs whose birthdays are this month — great upsell opportunities. Want me to draft a personalized message for any of them?
aiChat.cmdAppointments: You have 4 appointments today with an 87% fill rate. There's a 2.5-hour gap this afternoon — want me to draft a flash-offer SMS to fill it?
aiChat.cmdHelp: Here's what I can help you with: revenue analysis, customer insights, campaign creation, appointment management, stock alerts, and weekly briefings. Just ask!

weeklyBriefing.title: Your Week at a Glance
weeklyBriefing.subtitle: AI Weekly Briefing — Personalized for your business
weeklyBriefing.opportunityValue: Re-engage 3 lapsed VIP clients with a personalized loyalty offer
